name: ffmpeg-python
description: Python FFmpeg integration for frame pipelines, PyAV/libav bindings, OpenCV handoff, and validation helpers. PROACTIVELY activate for PyAV install/API usage, av.open, VideoFrame/AudioFrame, ffmpeg-python parameter mapping, subprocess command generation, rawvideo pipes, BGR/RGB bugs, OpenCV/cv2 processing, ffmpegcv, VidGear, Decord, and ML video pipelines.
